title: Rootless Podman with Netavark: IPv6 Port Forwarding Fails ("Connection reset") while IPv4 Works
body:
### Issue Description

Problem is specific to IPv6 via localhost when using rootless mode with netavark and port mapping (-p), but IPv4 and --network=host work correctly.

Connection is established, but reset immediately after the HTTP request is sent, before the application inside the container (even a minimal ASGI app or a simple FastAPI /ping endpoint) can log the request or respond.

### Steps to reproduce the issue



[reproduce_the_issue.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/20088087/reproduce_the_issue.txt)

1. Operating System: Fedora Linux 42 (Workstation Edition)
2. Podman Version: podman version 5.4.2
3. Podman Mode: rootless mode
4. Network Backend: netavark
5. podman network inspect podman: "ipv6_enabled": false
6. Firewall Status: firewalld, enabling/disabling masquerading did not affect this specific issue
7. See attached file


### Describe the results you received

* Host localhost:8080 was resolved.
* IPv6: ::1
* IPv4: 127.0.0.1
*   Trying [::1]:8080...
* Connected to localhost (::1) port 8080
* using HTTP/1.x
> GET /ping HTTP/1.1
> Host: localhost:8080
> User-Agent: curl/8.11.1
> Accept: */*
> 
* Request completely sent off
* Recv failure: Connexion ré-initialisée par le correspondant
* closing connection #0
curl: (56) Recv failure: Connexion ré-initialisée par le correspondant


### Describe the results you expected

*   Trying 127.0.0.1:8080...
* Connected to 127.0.0.1 (127.0.0.1) port 8080
* using HTTP/1.x
> GET /ping HTTP/1.1
> Host: 127.0.0.1:8080
> User-Agent: curl/8.11.1
> Accept: */*
> 
* Request completely sent off
< HTTP/1.1 200 OK
< date: Wed, 07 May 2025 16:33:51 GMT
< server: uvicorn
< content-length: 18
< content-type: application/json
< 
* Connection #0 to host 127.0.0.1 left intact

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: This is expected as the kernel doesn't support DNAT on ipv6 localhost so the only option we would have is a user space proxy which is already tracked in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14491
